headline: CDW Shelf Filing Highlights Capital Flexibility Valuation Discount And M&A Plans
summary: CDW Corporation (NasdaqGS:CDW) has filed a new shelf registration, giving the company flexibility to issue securities as needed. Management has outlined plans to return a large share of free cash flow to shareholders while keeping M&A as an active priority. The combination of potential capital raising, cash returns, and continued acquisition activity marks a material update for current and prospective investors. CDW is a major IT solutions provider, serving businesses, government, and...

headline: CDW CFO: 2026 Focus on Growth, Cash Flow and Buybacks as AI, PCs Drive Cautious Spend
summary: CDW (NASDAQ:CDW) Chief Financial Officer Al Miralles told investors at the Morgan Stanley TMT conference that the company is focused on “controlling what we can control” as it plans for 2026, after what he described as a difficult 2023 and 2024 marked by macro pressure, elongated customer decision c
